feedback: Coverage across Dwarka is truly impressive and I cannot praise it enough. I travel to many different parts of the city daily for my office work and the signal remains strong everywhere from hospital road to the outskirts where previously there was nothing. The consistency is what I really appreciate most about this operator.

I have been using this netwrk in Shimla for over two years now and the coverage has only gotten better month after month. Even areas that used to be prblmatic like underground parking lots and inside building lifts now get perfectly usable signal. The investment in infrastructure is clearly paying off for custmers.
No signal at home in Chandigarh. Have to go outside.

switched for 5g and evthing working perfectly in powai, speeds above 150 mbps network coverage is blanket and call quality noticeably better than previous provider, complete package. The speeds are genuinely impressive and make a real difference in daily usage.

netwrk covrage gets worse every monsoon season in Panaji. Same tower same problem for three years. Infrastructure clearly cannot handle wet weather and this basic reliability issue should have been fixed years ago. Completely unacceptable. I have complained multiple times but nothing has been done to fix this issue.

Call quality fantastic on this network but 5G experience disappointing. Calls crystal clear every time but 5G speeds nowhere near reality in Meerut. Getting barely better than 4G in most locations. Compared to my previous operator this is a massive upgrade in voice clarity.
Dead zones everywhere in Jodhpur new township. Pathetic.

Call quality degraded significantly since last month. Calls that used to be perfectly clear now have persistent static and occasional drops. Tried different fones and issue persists so clearly a netwrk prblm not device issue. I have tried different phones and the issue persists so clearly a network problem.
5G working great in Kolkata market area. Fast reliable.
Terrible call quality and network keeps dropping in Trichy.

the network has been unreliable in my ra of dehradun for past three weeks. signal drops randomly multiple times daily and takes several minutes to reconnect. no notification from operator about maintenance or issues. v poor communication. this is completely unacceptable for the premium monthly charges they are billing me.

The 5G experience has completely changed how I use my phone for both work and entertainment in Bhopal. Downloading large files takes seconds instead of minutes. Video calls are sharper with no buffering at all. Cloud backup happens in the background without any impact on other activities. Genuine next generation connectivity.
5g speeds fantastic and coverage comprehensive in bhubaneswar

I am genuinely impressed with how far the network coverage has come in Bangalore over the past year. Five years ago this operator was known for weak signal and dead zones but today their coverage is arguably the best available here. Full bars in every corner of the city including previously problematic indoor locations.

Switched for 5G and everything working perfectly in Trichy. Speeds above 250 Mbps network coverage is blanket and call quality noticeably better than previous provider. Complete package. Cloud gaming and streaming work flawlessly without any buffering or lag whatsoever.

Call qlity excellent and 5G speeds fast in Bhopal. Value for money on this plan genuinely good considering what competitors charge for similar servce levels. The HD voice technology really makes a noticeable difference in everyday conversations.

signed up for premium 5g plan three months ago expecting revolutionary change, reality in rajkot is that 5g available in maybe ten percent of places i frequent, for the extra money i pay this is absolutely not justifiable. For the extra money they charge for the 5G plan this experience is not acceptable.
5g coverage expanding well in madurai, signal strong
Call quality great but 5G missing and coverage weak.

the network coverage in bhopal has been consistently excellent for the past one full year of my subscription, whether i am indoors in my apartment or commuting through the busy city roads i always have strong and reliable signal without any interruption at all, never once experienced dead zones in my daily routine which is exactly what i expect from a premium service provider

Had high hopes for 5G but reality in Hubli is underwhelming. Coverage exists only in few pockets near IT parks. Rest of city including prime residential areas still has no 5G. At this rate it will take years to be citywide.

The 5G exprnce has been nothing short of disappointing in Dehradun. Upgraded specifically for promised high speeds but covrage is so patchy that I spend most time on 4G anyway. The few times it connects speeds barely better than 4G.
5G available but call drops frequent in Navi Mumbai.
5g speeds great but call quality degraded since upgrade
5G fast but data balance depletes quickly and pricing high.
Average 5G and average call quality. Standard service.
5g average and calls r also just standard in nagpur

just activated 5g on my new phone and the experience in visakhapatnam is absolutely brilliant. getting around 600 mbps consistently throughout the entire market ra where i spend most of my time. the rollout has been remarkably smooth and coverage extends well beyond what i had initially expected from the launch.

Network neither good nor bad but 5G where available is excellent in Pune. In the few spots where I get 5G signal the speeds are impressive at 600 Mbps. Wish neutral coverage would improve to match 5G quality. I have no strong feelings about it either way compared to other operators available.
5G good network reliable and pricing fair in Indore.

The network coverage in Kochi is average at best. Works fine for basic calling and messaging but nothing stands out compared to other operators. No major outages but also no impressive performance. Just middle of the road service. It does what I need for basic calling and messaging but nothing beyond that.
covrage exists but nothing impressive about it.
Full network bars in Faridabad everywhere I go.

I upgraded to the 5G plan three months ago and it has genuinely and completely transformed my entire mobile internet experience in Nagpur. Downloads that used to take minutes happen almost instantly now and streaming in 4K resolution is completely buffer free even during peak hours. Well worth the switch from the standard plan.

The voice calling experience on this network in Whitefield has been exceptional. I frequently make international calls to family in the US and UK and the clarity is almost indistinguishable from local calls. Zero delay zero echo zero drops. HD voice technology working perfectly on every single call.

Had terrible experience with call quality in Agra. Was on important client call and audio kept cutting out. Tried calling back three times same issue each time. This is unacceptable for the premium plan I am paying for. This is seriously affecting my work as I depend on clear voice calls for business.
Solid network coverage in Indiranagar. Full bars everywhere.

the network coverage in aurangabad is average at best, works fine for basic calling and messaging but nothing stands out comprd to other operators, no major outages but also no impressive performance, just middle of the road service. It does what I need for basic calling and messaging but nothing beyond that.
Three network outages this week alone in Trivandrum.
5g speeds r pathetic at 80 mbps. not worth it.

Network coverage okay not great not terrible but 5G has been major letdown in Bangalore. Coverage map shows my area as enabled but in practice connect to 5G maybe twenty percent of time. It does what I need for basic calling and messaging but nothing beyond that.

The 5G in Bandra is unremarkable neither fast nor slow but network coverage has been strong and dependable. At least basic connectivity works well even if 5G has not lived up to the premium marketing claims. For my daily browsing and social media usage the difference is barely perceptible honestly.

The 5G rollout in Whitefield has been extremely slow and existing coverage is unreliable. Signal keeps bouncing between 5G and 4G which actually makes experience worse than stable 4G. Constant handoffs cause drops and latency spikes. For the extra money they charge for the 5G plan this experience is not acceptable.
Network solid and calls crystal clear in Bhubaneswar hospital road.

5G nonexistent in Amritsar despite claims. Network full of dead zones in lake area. Call quality degraded with constant echo and drops. Nothing working properly on this network. I expected much better from a major operator that advertises heavily about their 5G.
5G neutral experience network solid but calls dropping in Trichy.

Signed up for premium 5G plan three months ago expecting revolutionary change. Reality in Powai is that 5G available in maybe ten percent of places I frequent. For the extra money I pay this is absolutely not justifiable. I regret upgrading to the 5G plan and wish I had stayed on regular 4G instead.

The network has been unreliable in my area of Meerut for past three weeks. Signal drops randomly multiple times daily and takes several minutes to reconnect. No notification from operator about maintenance or issues. Very poor communication. This is completely unacceptable for the premium monthly charges they are billing me.

5G genuinely impressive in Nagpur with 400 Mbps but overall covrage has gaps. When leaving 5G zones there are pockets with zero signl rather than graceful fallback to 4G which is prblmatic. Downloading large files takes seconds which was unthinkable just a year ago.
covrage in my area is nonexistent. Cannot make calls.

Call quality has been average throughout my time on this network in Hubli. Some days are better than others but overall neutral experience. Not bad enough to complain about but not good enough to praise particularly. Just standard. I have no strong opinion about it since it meets minimum expectations adequately.
5G speeds fantastic and coverage comprehensive in Amritsar.

excellent 5g speeds in kanpur but network drops completely in market ra near home, fast when connected but lose signal entirely in certain spots which defeats the purpose of the premium plan. The speeds are genuinely impressive and make a real difference in daily usage.

The call qlity is pathetic. I make fifty plus calls daily for work and at least ten have audio issues. Either echo or delay or complete drop. Tried different handsets and prblm persists across all of them. netwrk is at fault.

The call quality improvement since they upgraded the towers in my area of Rajkot has been truly remarkable and noticeable. Previously almost every second call had some form of distortion or echo but now every single call I make is crystal clear without any exception. The VoLTE HD voice is working exactly as advertised.
Call quality is excellent in Ranchi. Zero issues.

The voice calling experience on this network in Indore has been exceptional. I frequently make international calls to family in the US and UK and the clarity is almost indistinguishable from local calls. Zero delay zero echo zero drops. HD voice technology working perfectly on every single call.
5g unremarkable, coverage just okay too in hubli

Had terrible experience with call quality in Ghaziabad. Was on important client call and audio kept cutting out. Tried calling back three times same issue each time. This is unacceptable for the premium plan I am paying for. I have tried different phones and the issue persists so clearly a network problem.
network average but call quality has impressed me
No 5G yet but network coverage reliable in Ranchi.

The call quality improvement since they upgraded the towers in my area of Powai has been truly remarkable and noticeable. Previously almost every second call had some form of distortion or echo but now every single call I make is crystal clear without any exception. The VoLTE HD voice is working exactly as advertised.

Had high hopes for 5G but reality in Guwahati is underwhelming. Coverage exists only in few pockets near IT parks. Rest of city including prime residential areas still has no 5G. At this rate it will take years to be citywide.

Network coverage in Nagpur hospital road has dramatically improved over the past six months. Previously I regularly had annoying dead spots on my daily commute but now the signal is completely seamless from end to end without a single drop. Very pleased with the excellent progress this operator has made recently.

I live in Indiranagar and coverage situation is abysmal. Multiple dead zones within five kilometers of my home. For a major operator in a big city this level of coverage is completely unacceptable. Paying premium rates for substandard service is frustrating.
5G fast but data balance depletes quickly and pricing high in Dwarka market area.

Been on 5G plan for two months in Kozhikode and honestly the exprnce is just average. Some locations give good speeds while others no different from 4G. Not terrible but also not the game changer I hoped for when upgrading.

no 5g signal and calls drop ev few minutes

5G in Bhopal is unremarkable in my exprnce. Speed tests show improvement over 4G but in real world usage for browsing social media and streaming the difference is marginal. Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied with the upgrade. I expected more from the upgrade but it is what it is at this price point.

5G experience average network adequate but sim activation was nightmare. Took five days instead of promised two hours and support kept giving different timelines. I expected more from the upgrade but it is what it is at this price point.
5G great coverage solid calls clear in Trichy.

network coverage in kochi is neither great nor poor. some ras like university campus have decent signal while others are mediocre. overall a standard experience that does not make me want to switch but also does not make me want to recommend it specifically.

The call quality improvement since they upgraded the towers in my area of Trichy has been truly remarkable and noticeable. Call quality has been average but 5G nonexistent in Ahmedabad. Was hoping the 5G upgrade would improve voice too but since there is no 5G here I cannot even test that. Basic calls are okay nothing more. I have no strong opinion about it since it meets minimum expectations adequately.
call quality fine nothing amazing but 5g brilliant

5G working beautifully in Mumbai and network coverage expanded to cover most daily routes. Getting consistent 200 Mbps and signal never drops even during commute between different parts of the city. Cloud gaming and streaming work flawlessly without any buffering or lag whatsoever.

5G has not reached Rohini yet which is disappointing. However the existing 4G netwrk coverage is solid and reliable. Full bars everywhere. Just waiting for the 5G upgrade to complete the picture. I expected much better from a major operator that advertises heavily about their 5G.

The network coverage in Trivandrum excellent and call quality pristine. Even in remote areas within city I get full bars and calls connect instantly without delay or distortion. I have been testing the 5G systematically across multiple locations in Nagpur for the past month and the results are consistently impressive. Whether at my office in lake area or at home or in shopping areas I get solid 5G signal with speeds never dropping below 600 Mbps. A genuine upgrade over 4G.

Terrible call qlity for past month. Constant two to three second delay on every call making natural conversation impossible. Network coverage in Dwarka poor but 5G where available is genuinely fast at 150 Mbps. The issue is finding those spots. When you do the experience is great but they are too few and far between. I have complained multiple times but nothing has been done to fix this issue.

Call quality has been the strongest point for me with this telecom operator. Whether I am calling locally within Mysore or making long distance calls across the entire country the clarity is consistently excellent. No frustrating delays no annoying echoes and no unexpected drops at all.

Network coverage okay not great not terrible but 5G has been major letdown in Jaipur. Coverage map shows my area as enabled but in practice connect to 5G maybe twenty percent of time. I have no strong feelings about it either way compared to other operators available.

Call qlity has been average but 5G nonexistent in Indore. Was hoping the 5G upgrade would improve voice too but since there is no 5G here I cannot even test that. Basic calls are okay nothing more. It works for basic conversations which is all I really need from a phone service.

the 5g experience has completely changed how i use my phone for both work and entertainment in navi mumbai. downloading large files takes seconds instead of minutes. video calls r sharper with no buffering at all. cloud backup happens in the background without any impact on other activities. genuine next generation connectivity.

5G nonexistent in Allahabad despite claims. Network full of dead zones in bus stand. Call quality degraded with constant echo and drops. Nothing working properly on this network. The gap between what they promise in marketing and actual real world experience is huge.

the 5g in indore has matured significantly over the past twelve months, what started as a patchy and unreliable service with frequent disconnections is now comprehensive and fully dependable, speeds r consistently fast at 550 mbps and the overall experience finally matches the hype that surrounded the launch

5G disappointing in Faridabad and coverage patchy. Customer support unhelpful when reported issue. Just asked to wait without giving timeline for improvement which is not acceptable. The gap between what they promise in marketing and actual real world experience is huge.

5G disappointing and call qlity suffered since upgrade in Thane. Calls on 5G have noticeable delay not present on 4G. The speeds themselves barely better than before. Double disappointment. I regret upgrading to the 5G plan and wish I had stayed on regular 4G instead.

5G impressive but covrage patchy and call qlity poor in Whitefield hospital road.
5G absent covrage weak and support gave no resolution in Bangalore university campus.

Coverage in Saket lake area is a disaster. Network crashed in our locality for six hours yesterday. No calls no data nothing. No communication from operator about the outage. Multiple residents complained but no acknowledgment received. I am seriously considering switching to a competitor because this situation is unbearable.

Network signal average but calls are surprisingly good in Gurgaon. Did not expect such clear audio given the mediocre signal strength. The voice codec seems to handle low signal situations well. It does what I need for basic calling and messaging but nothing beyond that.
Network dead zone in Guwahati residential colony. Unacceptable service.
Call quality excellent but coverage patchy in Indiranagar.
Voice service average in my experience with this network.
Loving the 5G and call clarity has improved too in Delhi hospital road.
Outstanding coverage in Dehradun. Highly recommend.
No 5G yet but netwrk covrage reliable in Ahmedabad.
5G great coverage solid calls clear in Surat.

covrage in Pune near station is a disaster. netwrk crashed in our locality for six hours yesterday. No calls no data nothing. No communication from operator about the outage. Multiple residents complained but no acknowledgment received. This is completely unacceptable for the premium monthly charges they are billing me.
5G neutral exprnce but call qlity keeps dropping in Trivandrum beach road.

5G disappointing in Siliguri and coverage patchy. Customer support unhelpful when reported issue. Just asked to wait without giving timeline for improvement which is not acceptable. I expected much better from a major operator that advertises heavily about their 5G.
5G average in daily use. Not a big change.
5g standard, does slightly better than 4g, brly
Call quality terrible. Constant drops and echo.
Voice delay on every call. Natural conversation impossible.
Calls have constant static in Varanasi. Cannot hear anything.

Call quality has been the strongest point for me with this telecom operator. Whether I am calling locally within Dwarka or making long distance calls across the entire country the clarity is consistently excellent. No frustrating delays no annoying echoes and no unexpected drops at all.
Solid network coverage in Shimla. Full bars everywhere.
netwrk and call qlity both average, nothing stands out in dwarka hill ra
Excellent 5G strong covrage clear calls in Bangalore near station.
never had a dropped call on this network

5G experience neutral in Kanpur. Network coverage solid with full bars. But call quality took a hit recently with frequent audio drops during conversations which is concerning. I expected more from the upgrade but it is what it is at this price point.

5G in Patna is unremarkable in my exprnce. Speed tests show improvement over 4G but in real world usage for browsing social media and streaming the difference is marginal. Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied with the upgrade. For my daily browsing and social media usage the difference is barely perceptible honestly.

network solid and call quality great in koramangala, recharge plans offer good value with decent data limits, only complaint is mobile app which is slow and crashes frequently when checking balance. I would definitely recommend this operator to anyone looking for reliable coverage.
Worst coverage ever experienced. Considering switching.
covrage disappointing but 5G speeds impressive when availble in Hubli ring road.

Signed up for premium 5G plan three months ago expecting revolutionary change. Reality in Visakhapatnam is that 5G available in maybe ten percent of places I frequent. For the extra money I pay this is absolutely not justifiable. I regret upgrading to the 5G plan and wish I had stayed on regular 4G instead.
5g absent network terrible calls dropping in jodhpur

The 5G experience in Bhubaneswar has genuinely exceeded all of my initial expectations by a significant margin. I am getting consistent speeds above 80 Mbps throughout the entire day without any noticeable fluctuation. The remarkably low latency has made cloud gaming and 4K streaming absolutely seamless on my mobile device.

The 5G experience average for my usage but call quality notably poor this month in Mumbai. Voice calls frequently have delay and echo not present before. 5G data works okay for browsing but voice service needs attention. For my daily browsing and social media usage the difference is barely perceptible honestly.
5G unremarkable. Coverage just okay too in Powai.
5G working great in Nashik new township. Fast reliable.
5G icon shows but nothing loads in Jodhpur.
No 5G weak signal horrible call quality. Triple failure in Andheri ring road.

Call quality standard nothing remarkable but network coverage in Ahmedabad has been excellent. Full bars everywhere and zero outages in three months. Calling average but at least connectivity is reliable. It works for basic conversations which is all I really need from a phone service.

The 5G in Shimla is unremarkable neither fast nor slow but network coverage has been strong and dependable. At least basic connectivity works well even if 5G has not lived up to the premium marketing claims. I expected more from the upgrade but it is what it is at this price point.

Network neither good nor bad but 5G where available is excellent in Bhopal. In the few spots where I get 5G signal the speeds are impressive at 350 Mbps. Wish neutral coverage would improve to match 5G quality. I have no strong feelings about it either way compared to other operators available.
5G absent network terrible calls dropping in Nashik.

The network coverage in Visakhapatnam has been deteriorating over past few months. I used to have full bars in my apartment but now lucky to get two bars. Multiple calls to support yielded no results. They keep saying tower upgrade is planned but nothing happens.

the 5g in varanasi has matured significantly over the past twelve months. what started as a patchy and unreliable service with frequent disconnections is now comprehensive and fully dependable. speeds r consistently fast at 450 mbps and the overall experience finally matches the hype that surrounded the launch.

Been on this network for six months in Noida and coverage has been acceptable. Not amazing not terrible. Occasional weak spots but nothing causing serious inconvenience. Does what I need at a basic level without impressing me particularly. I have no strong feelings about it either way compared to other operators available.

had terrible experience with call quality in coimbatore, was on important client call and audio kept cutting out, tried calling back three times same issue each time, this is unacceptable for the premium plan i am paying for. For the premium plan I am paying this quality of voice service is completely unacceptable.
